Sections:
00: "org0001:8000000" (8000000-80004DC)


Source: "C:/Users/Artem/Documents/universitet/4.semester/P4_project/Assambly_Tutorials_VASM/Hello_World/GBA_Hello.asm"
                            	     1: ;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;
                            	     2: ; Header
                            	     3: 
                            	     4: 	.equ ramarea, 0x02000000
                            	     5: 	.equ CursorX,ramarea+32
                            	     6: 	.equ CursorY,ramarea+33
                            	     7: 
                            	     8: 	.org  0x08000000     ; GBA ROM Address starts at 0x08000000       
                            	     9: 
00:08000000 380000EA        	    10: 	b	ProgramStart	;000h    4     ROM Entry Point  (32bit ARM branch opcode, eg. "B rom_start") 
                            	    11: 	
                            	    12: ;004h    156   Nintendo Logo    (compressed bitmap, required!)
00:08000004 C8              	    13: 	.byte 0xC8,0x60,0x4F,0xE2,0x01,0x70,0x8F,0xE2,0x17,0xFF,0x2F,0xE1,0x12,0x4F,0x11,0x48     ; C

00:08000095 00

00:080000A0 1A
00:080000A1 9E

                            	    23: 	
                            	    24:     ;		123456789012
00:080000A4 4C4541524E41534D	    25:     .ascii "LEARNASM.NET";0A0h    12    Game Title       (uppercase ascii, max 12 characters)	
00:080000AC 2E4E4554
00:080000B0 30303030        	    26:     .ascii "0000"	;0ACh    4     Game Code        (uppercase ascii, 4 characters)
00:080000B4 3030            	    27:     .ascii "00"		;0B0h    2     Maker Code       (uppercase ascii, 2 characters)
00:080000B6 96              	    28: 	.byte 0x96		;0B2h    1     Fixed value      (must be 96h, required!)
00:080000B7 00              	    29: 	.byte 0			;0B3h    1     Main unit code   (00h for current GBA models)
00:080000B8 00              	    30: 	.byte 0			;0B4h    1     Device type      (usually 00h) (bit7=DACS/debug related)
00:080000B9 00              	    31: 	.space 7		;0B5h    7     Reserved Area    (should be zero filled)
00:080000BA *
00:080000C0 00              	    32: 	.byte 0			;0BCh    1     Software version (usually 00h)
00:080000C1 00              	    33: 	.byte 0			;0BDh    1     Complement check (header checksum, required!)
00:080000C2 0000            	    34: 	.word 0			;0BEh    2     Reserved Area    (should be zero filled)
00:080000C4 00000000        	    35: 	.long 0			;0C0h    4     RAM Entry Point  (32bit ARM branch opcode, eg. "B ram_start")
00:080000C8 00              	    36: 	.byte 0			;0C4h    1     Boot mode        (init as 00h - BIOS overwrites this value!)
00:080000C9 00              	    37: 	.byte 0			;0C5h    1     Slave ID Number  (init as 00h - BIOS overwrites this value!)
00:080000CA 00              	    38: 	.space 26		;0C6h    26    Not used         (seems to be unused)
00:080000CB *
00:080000E4 00000000        	    39: 	.long 0			;0E0h    4     JOYBUS Entry Pt. (32bit ARM branch opcode, eg. "B joy_start")
                            	    40: 
                            	    41: ;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;	
                            	    42: ; Program Start
                            	    43: 
                            	    44: 
                            	    45: ProgramStart:
00:080000E8 03D4A0E3        	    46: 	mov sp,#0x03000000			;Init Stack Pointer
                            	    47: 	
00:080000EC 0143A0E3        	    48: 	mov r4,#0x04000000  		;DISPCNT -LCD Control
00:080000F0 012BA0E3032082E3	    49: 	mov r2,#0x403    			;4= Layer 2 on / 3= ScreenMode 3
00:080000F8 002084E5        	    50: 	str	r2,[r4]         	
                            	    51: 
00:080000FC 04109FE5        	    52: 	ldr r1,HelloWorldAddress	;Address of Hello World Message
00:08000100 060000EB        	    53: 	bl PrintString				;Show Message
                            	    54: 
                            	    55: InfLoop:
00:08000104 FEFFFFEA        	    56:       b InfLoop					;Halt
                            	    57: 	
                            	    58: 		
                            	    59: HelloWorldAddress:
00:08000108 0C010008        	    60: 	.long HelloWorld			;Pointer to Hello message
                            	    61: 	
                            	    62: HelloWorld:
00:0800010C 48656C6C6F20576F	    63: 	.byte "Hello World",255
00:08000114 726C64
00:08000117 FF
                            	    64: 	.align 4
                            	    65: 	
                            	    66: ;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;
                            	    67: 
                            	    68: PrintString:					;Print 255 terminated string 
00:08000120 FF5F2DE9        	    69: 	STMFD sp!,{r0-r12, lr}
                            	    70: PrintStringAgain:
00:08000124 0100D1E4        	    71: 		ldrB r0,[r1],#1
00:08000128 FF0050E3        	    72: 		cmps r0,#255
00:0800012C 0100000A        	    73: 		beq PrintStringDone		;Repeat until 255
00:08000130 010000EB        	    74: 		bl printchar 			;Print Char
00:08000134 FAFFFFEA        	    75: 		b PrintStringAgain
                            	    76: PrintStringDone:
00:08000138 FF9FBDE8        	    77: 	LDMFD sp!,{r0-r12, pc}
                            	    78: 	
                            	    79: ;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;
                            	    80: 	
                            	    81: PrintChar:
00:0800013C FF5F2DE9        	    82: 	STMFD sp!,{r0-r12, lr}
00:08000140 0040A0E3        	    83: 	mov r4,#0
00:08000144 0050A0E3        	    84: 		mov r5,#0
                            	    85: 		
00:08000148 0234A0E3203083E3	    86: 		mov r3,#CursorX
00:08000150 0040D3E5        	    87: 		ldrB r4,[r3]			;X pos
00:08000154 0234A0E3213083E3	    88: 		mov r3,#CursorY
00:0800015C 0050D3E5        	    89: 		ldrB r5,[r3]			;Y pos
                            	    90: 		
00:08000160 0634A0E3        	    91: 		mov r3,#0x06000000 		;VRAM base
                            	    92: 		
00:08000164 1060A0E3        	    93: 		mov r6,#8*2				;Xpos, 2 bytes per pixel, 8 bytes per char
00:08000168 940602E0        	    94: 		mul r2,r4,r6
00:0800016C 023083E0        	    95: 		add r3,r3,r2
                            	    96: 		
00:08000170 0F4CA0E3        	    97: 		mov r4,#240*8*2			;Ypos, 240 pixels per line,
00:08000174 950402E0        	    98: 		mul r2,r5,r4				;2 bytes per pixel, 8 lines per char
00:08000178 023083E0        	    99: 		add r3,r3,r2
                            	   100: 		
00:0800017C 58408FE2        	   101: 		adr r4,BitmapFont 		;Font source
                            	   102: 		
00:08000180 200040E2        	   103: 		sub r0,r0,#32			;First Char is 32 (space)
00:08000184 804184E0        	   104: 		add r4,r4,r0,asl #3		;8 bytes per char
                            	   105: 		
00:08000188 0810A0E3        	   106: 		mov r1,#8				;8 lines 
                            	   107: DrawLine:
00:0800018C 0870A0E3        	   108: 		mov r7,#8 				;8 pixels per line
00:08000190 0180D4E4        	   109: 		ldrb r8,[r4],#1			;Load Letter
00:08000194 019CA0E3        	   110: 		mov r9,#0b100000000		;Mask
                            	   111: 				
00:08000198 FF2CA0E3402082E3	   112: 		mov r2, #0b1111111101000000; Color: ABBBBBGGGGGRRRRR   A=Alpha
                            	   113: DrawPixel:
00:080001A0 090018E1        	   114: 		tst r8,r9				;Is bit 1?
00:080001A4 B0204311        	   115: 		strneh r2,[r3]			;Yes? then fill pixel (HalfWord)
00:080001A8 023083E2        	   116: 		add r3,r3,#2
00:080001AC E990A0E1        	   117: 		mov r9,r9,ror #1		;Bitshift Mask
00:080001B0 017057E2        	   118: 		subs r7,r7,#1
00:080001B4 F9FFFF1A        	   119: 		bne DrawPixel			;Next Hpixel
                            	   120: 		
00:080001B8 1D3E83E2        	   121: 		add r3,r3,#480-16	   ;Move Down a line (240 pixels *2 bytes) 
00:080001BC 011051E2        	   122: 		subs r1,r1,#1								;-1 char (16 px)
00:080001C0 F1FFFF1A        	   123: 		bne DrawLine			;Next Vline
                            	   124: 		
                            	   125: LineDone:	
00:080001C4 0234A0E3203083E3	   126: 		mov r3,#CursorX
00:080001CC 0000D3E5        	   127: 		ldrB r0,[r3]	
00:080001D0 010080E2        	   128: 		add r0,r0,#1			;Move across screen
00:080001D4 0000C3E5        	   129: 		strB r0,[r3]	
00:080001D8 FF9FBDE8        	   130: 	LDMFD sp!,{r0-r12, pc}
                            	   131: 
                            	   132: ;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;
                            	   133: 	
                            	   134: BitmapFont:
00:080001DC 00              	   135:         .byte 0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00     ;  0
00:080001DD 00
00:080001DE 00
00:080001DF 00
00:080001E0 00

00:080001E3 00
